bme_local_info_t Struct Reference
[Bare Metal Environment APIs]

Local information, passed to each tile on its stack. More...


Data Fields

int index
 Index of this tile in the global array.
tte_t global_info_tte
 Mapping information for the global data structure; maps the structure coherently and at an available VA.
bme_global_info_t * global_info
 Pointer to the global data structure, assuming it is mapped via global_info_tte.

Detailed Description

Local information, passed to each tile on its stack.

Each tile gets its own copy.

Field Documentation

int bme_local_info_t::index

Index of this tile in the global array.

tte_t bme_local_info_t::global_info_tte

Mapping information for the global data structure; maps the structure coherently and at an available VA.

bme_global_info_t* bme_local_info_t::global_info

Pointer to the global data structure, assuming it is mapped via global_info_tte.
